notes: Reworked activity forms into guided sections: what the activity is, when it happens, where Pathmark should put it, Calendar details, and Google Tasks prompt details.
Changed Calendar scheduling to ask for start time plus duration, then calculate the end time automatically.
Kept Google Tasks as a date-based first-step prompt and moved optional reference time into a collapsed note-only section.
Made destination labels clearer: weekly tasklist, Calendar time block, and first-step task prompt.
Added validation that prompts users to add required dates only for the selected outputs.
release_notes: Improves the activity form so the UI guides users through activity basics, timing, output destinations, Calendar block details, and Google Tasks first-step prompts. Calendar end time is now calculated from start time plus duration to reduce confusing start/end entries, and Google Tasks reference time is hidden as an optional note-only field.
